examples: They sat in the arbour and chatted over tea.
Benedick was quietly seated reading in an arbour.
The honours of the mulberry tree, the canal and the yew arbour would all be made over to her.
Speaking in Geneva, Ms Arbour said she was extremely distressed by Mr Johnston's abduction.
Ms Arbour's main job, of course, is to investigate Mr Milosevic and his minions.
